languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

languages.text: "Генетор Фебрус, я надеюсь, что вы понимаете неординарность подобного заявления в адрес сервочерепа?" {n}Хейнрикс с недобрым интересом рассматривает Нунциуса.{/n} "Надеюсь, все дело в вашей персональной сентиментальности, а не присутствии в вашем инструменте ереси".

"Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."
languages.original_text: "Генетор Фебрус, я надеюсь, что вы понимаете неординарность подобного заявления в адрес сервочерепа?" {n}Хейнрикс с недобрым интересом рассматривает Нунциуса.{/n} "Надеюсь, все дело в вашей персональной сентиментальности, а не присутствии в вашем инструменте ереси".

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how extraordinary such a claim sounds when directed at a servo-skull?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim interest.{/n} "Let us pray this is merely a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

"Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how extraordinary such a claim sounds when directed at a servo-skull?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim interest.{/n} "Let us pray this is merely a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

"Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

"Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

"Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

languages.text: "Genetor Februs, ich nehme an, Euch ist klar, wie ungewöhnlich es ist, so mit einem einfachen Servoschädel zu reden?" {n}Heinrix studiert Nuncius mit grimmigem Interesse.{/n} "Lasst uns beten, dass dies nur eine sentimentale Marotte Eurerseits ist und keine Ketzerei in Eurem Gerät."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Februs, ich nehme an, Euch ist klar, wie ungewöhnlich es ist, so mit einem einfachen Servoschädel zu reden?" {n}Heinrix studiert Nuncius mit grimmigem Interesse.{/n} "Lasst uns beten, dass dies nur eine sentimentale Marotte Eurerseits ist und keine Ketzerei in Eurem Gerät.

languages.text: « Genetor Februs, j'imagine que vous saisissez à quel point il est étonnant de parler ainsi à un simple servocrâne ? » {n}Heinrix étudie Nuncius avec sévérité.{/n} « J'espère qu'il ne s'agit là que d'un caprice sentimental de votre part, et que tout ceci n'est aucunement lié à une quelconque présence hérétique dans ce dispositif. »
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

traits.locale_text: « Genetor Februs, j'imagine que vous saisissez à quel point il est étonnant de parler ainsi à un simple servocrâne ? » {n}Heinrix étudie Nuncius avec sévérité.{/n} « J'espère qu'il ne s'agit là que d'un caprice sentimental de votre part, et que tout ceci n'est aucunement lié à une quelconque présence hérétique dans ce dispositif. »

languages.text: “基因士费布鲁斯，我想你应该明白，这样对着一颗普通的伺服头骨说话是一件极不寻常的事情吧？”{n}海因里希用冷峻的审视目光注视着努恩修斯。{/n}“但愿这只是你多愁善感的怪癖，而不是因为你那装置里藏有异端之物。”
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

traits.locale_text: “基因士费布鲁斯，我想你应该明白，这样对着一颗普通的伺服头骨说话是一件极不寻常的事情吧？”{n}海因里希用冷峻的审视目光注视着努恩修斯。{/n}“但愿这只是你多愁善感的怪癖，而不是因为你那装置里藏有异端之物。”

languages.text: «Genetor Februs, ¿se da cuenta de lo poco común que es hablar con un simple servocráneo como este?». {n}Heinrix estudia a Nuncius con gesto sombrío.{/n} «Esperemos que sea solo un capricho sentimental por su parte y no una prueba de herejía en el dispositivo».
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

traits.locale_text: «Genetor Februs, ¿se da cuenta de lo poco común que es hablar con un simple servocráneo como este?». {n}Heinrix estudia a Nuncius con gesto sombrío.{/n} «Esperemos que sea solo un capricho sentimental por su parte y no una prueba de herejía en el dispositivo».

languages.text: "ジェネター・フェブリュス、ただのサーボ・スカルとこうして話すことがどれほど珍しいことか理解してもらえたかな？"{n}ハインリックスは険しい表情でヌンシウスを見つめる。{/n}"あなたの装置の中に異端が存在するのではなく、これが単なるあなたの感傷的な気まぐれであることを祈りましょう"
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."

languages.text: "Genetör Februs, böylesine sıradan bir hizmeletle bu şekilde konuşmanın ne kadar olağan dışı olduğunu anladığınızdan eminim..." {n}Heinrix, kasvetli bir niyetle Nuncius'u inceliyor.{/n} "Umalım da bu, cihazınızdaki bir kâfirlikten ziyade sadece sizin açınızdan duygusal bir heves olsun."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."
